Script.label: MISC_Autobrake_OFF
Script.script: (L:I_MIP_AUTOBRAKE_MAX_L, Number) 1 == if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_MAX) } (SPLIT:100) (L:I_MIP_AUTOBRAKE_MED_L, Number) 1 == if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_MED) } (SPLIT:100) (L:I_MIP_AUTOBRAKE_LO_L, Number) 1 == if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_LO) }

Script.label: MISC_Autobrake_TOGGLE
Script.script: (A:SIM ON GROUND, Bool) s0 (L:I_MIP_AUTOBRAKE_LO_L, Number) s1 (L:I_MIP_AUTOBRAKE_MED_L, Number) s2 l0 1 == if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_MAX) } l0 l1 == l0 l2 == and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_LO) } l0 l1 < l0 l2 == and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_MED) } l0 l1 == l0 l2 < and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Autobrake_OFF) }

Script.label: MISC_GndCTL_TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:S_OH_RCRD_GND_CTL, Number) s0 1 + s1 l0 ++ (>L:S_OH_RCRD_GND_CTL, Number) l1 ++ (>L:S_OH_RCRD_GND_CTL, Number)

Script.label: MISC_Terrain_BOTH_TOGGLE
Script.script: (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_CAPT_L, Number) 0 == (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_FO_L, Number) 0 == and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Terrain_FO_TOGGLE) } (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_CAPT_L, Number) 1 == (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_FO_L, Number) 0 == and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Terrain_FO_TOGGLE) } (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_CAPT_L, Number) 0 == (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_FO_L, Number) 1 == and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Terrain_FO_TOGGLE) } (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_CAPT_L, Number) 1 == (L:I_MIP_GPWS_TERRAIN_ON_ND_FO_L, Number) 1 == and if{ 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Terrain_Capt_TOGGLE) 1 (>K:FENIX_A3XX-MISC_Terrain_FO_TOGGLE) }
